title: Wham Crystal 1x 14L Plastic Storage Boxes with Lids Clear Transparent. Small Size, Strong (Pack of 1, 14 Litre). Made in the UK
features: Storage Types: Ideal for home storage in cupboards, garages, lofts, play rooms, nurseries and more.

Thoughtful Design: Featuring a transparent clear colour design on both the boxes themselves and the lids, it's easy to view the contents of these boxes. Plus they're stackable when in use (just pop the lids on and stack them up) and nestable when not.
Small Size: These boxes are small at approximately 14 litres in capacity. The size makes them ideal for storing bedding, office supplies, decorations and more. Approximately 39 x 29 x 17cm
Secure Handles: Push the lids on to clip them over the box and make them really secure and easy to hold and handle.
description: A set of 1 high quality Wham 14 litre plastic storage box from our Crystal range. This box is a versatile storage option to help you organise both your home and office. The set comes in a pack of 1 14 litre box and 1 clip on lid. This multi purpose box is ideal for use in offices, cupboards, garages, home office, bedrooms, lofts, storage units and more around the home and office. It also make great storage for toys, bedding, winter clothes and much much more. We've designed this box with transparent sides and transparent lids to make it easy to view the contents. The boxes are stackable when in use and nest inside one another when not. Made right here in the UK . Contains: 1x 14L Wham Crystal Clear Plastic Storage Boxes Dimensions (approx): 39 x 29 x 17cm Dimensions are taken from the largest point (outer edge of the box for Storage purposes) .
